content: How do I contact support for urgent issues?

I'm so sorry to hear you're experiencing an urgent issue. I'm here to help you get in touch with our support team as quickly as possible.

For urgent technical issues, you can reach out to us through our 24/7 emergency hotline at **1-800-MAKTEK-911**. This hotline is available outside of our regular business hours, which are Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST.

If your issue isn't extremely urgent, you can also contact us during business hours through:
* Live chat on our website
* Phone at 1-800-MAKTEK-01
* Email at support@maktek.com (we'll get back to you within 24 hours)

Please know that we're here to help, and we'll do our best to resolve your issue as quickly as possible.
